programme.desc: An acclaimed account of the great British painter who was a radical and revolutionary artist.

programme.title: Suffragette
programme.desc: In early 20th-century Britain, a young working mother joins a diverse group of women who fight for equality and the right to vote.

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of English-born Joan Stanley, who was recruited by the KGB in the mid 1930s and went undetected as a British spy for over a half a century.

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: This period drama tells the tale of two landscape artists who become romantically involved while constructing the grand gardens at King Louis XIV's palace at Versailles.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: Based on the World War I memoir by Vera Brittain, the tale of one woman's searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again.

programme.title: Love and Friendship
programme.desc: A beautiful young widow visits her in-laws' estate while waiting for social chatter about her personal indiscretions to pass.

programme.desc: A celebration marking the release of a report on police corruption ends in bloodshed, when shots ring out on the 65th floor of a Midtown Manhattan high rise.

programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera discover a dead woman among the sheets at an industry laundry facility.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After being Caught in the crosshairs, Danny opens fire, but upon investigation learns the man he shot is an undercover cop. Witnesses believe Danny killed the wrong guy and it's up to Mac to prove otherwise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston baseball fan found dead in a New York parking lot, Detective Bonasera discovers both victims had one thing in common.

programme.desc: Mac and Hawkes investigate the suspicious death of a free climber. Danny and Stella unravel the mystery of a world famous designer, and Aiden revisits an unsolved rape case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Hawkes explore the gruesome death of a man, murdered in Grand Central Station, while Stella and Danny investigate why a blind woman was left strangled on a rooftop.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It's mayhem at the Bronx Zoo. Mac, Danny and new CSI Lindsay look into the death of a man thrown to the tigers, and Stella and Hawkes are called in to find an elegantly dressed young woman dead on a carousel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man is found beaten to death at the San Gennaro festival leads Mac and Stella from the alleys to the power players of Wall Street. As Hawkes probes the death of a young boy trapped in an apartment fire.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella and Lindsay try to discover why a young dancer was thrown from a tram. As Hawkes and Danny wonder if a man's obsession with getting his son into an elite preschool leads to his own death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As the CSIs track down a witness to a brutal slaying, they uncover the world of Manhattan "Lolitas", young girls who trawl for older men. A body with two identities is discovered in the boat pond in Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI Miami Lieutenant Horatio and the entire NY Crime Lab races against the clock to catch a twisted sociopath before he kills again in this second part of the CSI: Miami/CSI: NY crossover episode.

programme.desc: In a New York doll "hospital", Mac and Danny recover the corpse of the doll "doctor". Meanwhile, Stella and Hawkes find a young woman dead in her apartment.

programme.desc: A roller derby star drops dead in the middle of a match, and Mac and Stella come to the rink to investigate. Hawkes and Danny unravel the mystery of why a struggling novelist was killed.

programme.desc: A billionaire is found dead and when Danny begins to process the scene, he trips a 'panic' button, sealing himself in with the body. And who pushed a stripper onto a 10,000-degree spotlight and left her to sizzle?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny, Flack, and Lindsay encounter a rapidly-melting crime scene when a model is found dead at an ice-themed promotional party for vodka, apparently stabbed by an icicle.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A decapitated corpse is found hung upside-down in a dorm room during a party. The shirt the victim was wearing is decorated with symbols out of numerology and Greek mythology.

programme.desc: Danny, Lindsay, and Hawkes investigate the murder of one of the altporn models known as the Suicide Girls while Mac and Stella look for answers in the death of a street basketball player.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating the death of a hotel employee at a swimsuit modelling shoot, the CSI team hears shots across the street and run to another crime scene where a shocked woman has just shot an intruder.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young woman dies after she starts bleeding from her eyes, nose, and mouth while at a party aboard a subway train, leading the team to speculate that she is the victim of a biological attack.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called in when a young paintball champion is found dead in a warehouse. They soon find out that his fiercest rival, with whom he was faced in a death match, has gone missing.

programme.desc: A parachute jumper meets his death when his parachute is struck by a flock of pigeons, all of which strangely end up dead beside his body.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called in when a bartender is robbed and shot. When the police capture a suspect matching a witness' description, the team is stunned when the suspect is Sheldon Hawkes.

programme.desc: A man is found shot dead in a rundown Rockaway Beach house under a pile of money. Outside in his backyard is an ark that contains animals and eight people.

programme.desc: A woman is found sawn in half inside a magician's wooden box onstage in an abandoned Times Square theatre. The investigation reveals the victim worked for a famous illusionist.

programme.desc: When a body is stolen from the coroner's van the team stumbles onto a lab performing genetic testing on human hibernation.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police are sceptical about a driver's dubious name. A husband and wife protect each other in a domestic violence case. A woman's 12-year friendship is strained by suspected theft from her roommate.

programme.title: Killer In My Village
programme.desc: Shedding light on shocking crimes that have taken place in small towns and villages across Britain, from execution murders by complete strangers to crimes of passion.

programme.title: Killer at the Crime Scene
programme.desc: Examines murder investigations through the eyes of the scientists who collect and analyse evidence the killers left behind.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A look at interrogation footage released by courts after a guilty verdict has been reached, including when the criminals begin to crack and when the investigators close in on their case.

programme.title: Trace of Evil

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Deeper Look from NY
programme.desc: At a pivotal moment for Japan-US ties, what role does Japan Society play in enhancing cultural understanding? President & CEO Joshua Walker explains.

programme.title: BOSAI
programme.desc: Bear encounters are happening more frequently all over Japan. We'll look at new technologies to reduce the danger they pose, such as GPS tracking and an AI model that predicts bear encounters.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: A new treatment for irregular heartbeats, pulsed field ablation, or PFA, reduces patient burden and offers high success rates. We also explore a food component that may help prevent the condition.

programme.title: NHK News 7
programme.desc: News 7 is NHK's flagship domestic evening news program, bringing you the latest from our Tokyo studio. It's presented with English audio on NHK World for our international viewers.

programme.title: Journeys in Japan
programme.desc: Michael Keida explores mountainous Northern Yatsugatake in Nagano Prefecture in winter, via cross-country skiing, snow-shoeing and crampon-climbing with a guide. He also soaks in heavenly hot springs.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Fujimoto Akio's film "LOST LAND," about Rohingya siblings in a refugee camp who embark on a perilous journey, was honored at the 2025 Venice Film Festival. He talks about his passion for filmmaking.

programme.title: National Parks of Japan
programme.desc: Daisen-Oki National Park comprises the Oki Islands, which boast spectacular geological formations, and a mainland area with shrines and sacred mountains that gave rise to myths and legends.

programme.title: A Culture Built with Wood Hida
programme.desc: The Hida region in Gifu Prefecture has some of Japan's most extensive broadleaf forests and has been home to artisans who possess sophisticated woodworking skills, such as kigumi or wood joinery.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: It's spring, and a group of young men and women have come to the beach for some recreational clam-digging. The sea breeze mixes with the smell of freshly-cooked seafood. There's also love in the air.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: A Culture Built with Wood Kishu
programme.desc: Kishu, in the southern part of the Kii Peninsula, is famous among chefs worldwide for its charcoal production. Join us as we examine what fuels the eco-friendly charcoal culture of Kishu.

programme.desc: We travel to a well-known tourist resort just outside of Edo, where day-trippers are enjoying river recreation and forest walks, praying at local shrines, and sitting down for riverside picnics.

programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: Adam Smith is a potter from England who follows a self-sufficient lifestyle in the mountains of Nagano Prefecture. He creates rich natural colors by using handmade glazes made from local plants.

programme.desc: In September, 11 districts in Yatsuo, Toyama Prefecture parade along different routes performing Etchu Owara-Kaze-no-Bon, a 300-year-old matsuri that features elegant music, dancing, and singing.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Michiko
programme.desc: Takao Michiko devoted 50 years to bridging Japan and Ukraine through ballet. She and her Kyiv-based son drove vital projects despite the war. Defying the sirens, ensuring the curtain never falls...

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony
programme.desc: An autumn visit of Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden where nature from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule of culture and history.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: NHK World Selection
programme.desc: A selection of acclaimed programs from NHK's domestic channels dubbed into English.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony
programme.desc: In Uda, discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden, where the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule, a sanctuary of the local culture and history.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: In Japan, nostalgia is spreading for the Showa era (1926-1989). We introduce electronics, retro designs, and other elements of a period that many Japanese people consider the "good old days."

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: Karuizawa is cool even in summer, making it a popular resort town. We meet local cats at a fashionable home goods shop and a restaurant in a remodeled folk home. They're sure to bring in customers!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: On the islands and coast of the Yamaguchi end of the Seto Inland Sea, we experience a warm welcome in these hard-working small communities, poor in amenities but rich in happiness and human kindness.

programme.title: Texico
programme.desc: Learn the principles of programming without a computer. Animated characters provide fun and lucid explanations of 5 core processes: analysis, combination, generalization, abstraction, and simulation.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: Among Mee's friends, there's a popular game where you sneak up and squeeze your friends' butts. When someone does it to Mee, Mee shivers and feels weird. Papa says "That's your Inner Alarm's alert."

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: Philadelphia, the City of Brotherly Love, is the East Coast's second-largest city in the US after NYC. It's the birthplace of the US and was once the capital. It's now a favorite for history buffs.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: NHK WORLD TV Special Program
programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a wide range of programs from news, current affairs, documentaries, etc. focusing on Japan and Asia.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Miyama is famous for its roof thatching tradition. The town of Hanase continues to serve the local specialty, foraged, wild-food cuisine.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Binod-san from Nepal works at a car sales company as a mechanic. When he doesn't understand his superior's instruction in Japanese, he hesitates to ask. He will learn how to clarify and confirm.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Trash Tribe is a band led by Oomote Fumiaki. Their instruments are made with marine trash. Fishing line and driftwood on strings. Plastic bottle percussion. Their laid-back music has fans of all ages.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: Cops vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: Howling IV: The Original Nightmare
programme.desc: A successful author moves to a small town after suffering a mental breakdown and is tormented by demons and werewolves.

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: Dollman vs. Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: A group of girls are kidnapped and trained to become assassins for a criminal organisation, ruled over by the ruthless Madam M.

programme.title: Prisoners Of The Ghostland
programme.desc: In the treacherous frontier city of Samurai Town, a notorious criminal must break an evil curse in order to rescue an abducted girl who has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: Christian, a millionaire heir, meets Sigrid, a young student, on a dating app. They hit it off, but there's only one problem: Christian lives with Frank, a man who dresses up and constantly acts like a dog.

programme.title: Open Your Eyes
programme.desc: A very handsome gentleman finds the love of his life, but suffers an accident and needs to have his face reconstructed through surgery after being severely disfigured.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros.
programme.desc: Two Brooklyn plumbers, Mario and Luigi, must travel to another dimension to rescue a princess from the evil dictator King Koopa and stop him from taking over the world.

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars is content with his artificial girlfriend: a life-sized doll named Bianca. When he develops feelings for an attractive co-worker, Lars finds himself lost in a unique love triangle.

programme.title: Relaxer
programme.desc: With the impending Y2K apocalypse fast approaching, Abbie is faced with the ultimate challenge - the unbeatable level 256 on Pac-Man - and he can't get off the couch until he conquers it.

programme.title: Relaxer
programme.desc: With the impending Y2K apocalypse fast approaching, Abbie is faced with the ultimate challenge - the unbeatable level 256 on Pac-Man - and he can't get off the couch until he conquers it.

programme.title: Come To Daddy
programme.desc: Norval, a privileged man-child travels to the beautiful and remote cabin of his estranged father, in order to reconnect with him as he hasn't seen him in 30 years.

programme.title: Psycho Goreman
programme.desc: In this light-hearted yet violent cosmic, comedy adventure, an intergalactic warlord becomes enslaved to a pair of Earth children after they unwittingly resurrect him.

programme.title: Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey
programme.desc: After Christopher Robin abandons them for college, Pooh and Piglet embark on a bloody rampage as they search for a new source of food.

programme.title: Winnie The Pooh: Blood And Honey 2
programme.desc: Not wanting to live in the shadows any longer, Winnie-the-Pooh, Piglet, Owl and Tigger take their fight to the town of Ashdown, leaving a bloody trail of death and mayhem in their wake.

programme.title: Possession
programme.desc: A woman starts exhibiting increasingly disturbing behavior after asking her husband for a divorce. Suspicions of infidelity soon give way to something much more sinister.

programme.title: What Lies Below
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl returns home from camp and learns her mother has a new boyfriend, one she intends to marry; a man whose charm, intelligence and beauty make him look like he's not human at all.

programme.title: Dark Diamond
programme.desc: After his father's death, a man vows vengeance against the relatives who abandoned him.

programme.title: Corrective Measures
programme.desc: When a powerless new inmate arrives at a prison for supervillains, he must choose his friends wisely, or become a pawn in the deadly game between the Warden and The Lobe.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: After being forced to drive a mysterious passenger at gunpoint, a man finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where it becomes clear that not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Upstream Color
programme.desc: A woman is abducted and hypnotised with an organic material harvested from a specific flower. When she falls for a man, the two realise he may also have been subjected to the same process.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: The Stunt man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars is content with his artificial girlfriend: a life-sized doll named Bianca. When he develops feelings for an attractive co-worker, Lars finds himself lost in a unique love triangle.

programme.title: The Science of Sleep
programme.desc: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is love-struck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

programme.title: Crabs!
programme.desc: In the middle of prom night, a swarm of murderous crabs descends upon a small coastal town.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: When pregnant Ellie returns to her childhood home to complete a book, she's reunited with her mother. Consumed by dark memories of the house, she ends up unearthing a horrifying reality.

programme.title: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
programme.desc: Teenagers are tortured, chopped up and impaled on meat hooks by a demented backwards family. This grisly 1974 blood-curdler ranks with Psycho and Halloween as a landmark in the horror/slasher genre.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: A mysterious woman on the run, and the resourceful fixer assigned to bring her in. Their two unique stories inextricably link, as the stakes of the pursuit rise to apocalyptic proportions.

programme.title: The Chaser
programme.desc: A cop investigates the disappearance of several call girls he pimps out.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: A young London writer follows strangers for inspiration, but his hobby becomes an obsession, leading him further into their lives than he ever intended.

programme.title: Police Story 3: Super Cop
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective teams up with his female Red Chinese counterpart to stop a Chinese drug czar.

programme.title: Final Cut
programme.desc: Life imitates art when the cast and crew of a low-budget zombie flick start to turn into the living dead.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: Beyond Re-Animator
programme.desc: The imprisoned Dr West continues his gruesome experiments with the aid of the new jailhouse physician.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Billy Warlock) discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Caligula: The Ultimate Cut
programme.desc: Excess, violence and corruption mark the notorious emperor's reign in first-century Rome.

programme.title: Hellraiser IV: Bloodline
programme.desc: In the 22nd century, a scientist attempts to right the wrong his ancestor created: the puzzle box that opens the gates of Hell and unleashes Pinhead and his Cenobite legions.

programme.title: Beyond Re-Animator
programme.desc: The imprisoned Dr West continues his gruesome experiments with the aid of the new jailhouse physician.

programme.title: The Parts You Lose
programme.desc: A young boy in a small North Dakota town befriends a potentially dangerous fugitive.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: From their base in the city sewers, turtle heroes Michelangelo, Raphael, Leonardo and Donatello are on a mission to defeat an evil warlord and wipe out crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II
programme.desc: The heroes in a half-shell are back. Our fearsome foursome go after the glowing canister that has slipped into the hands of the evil Shredder and his mutant allies, Rahzar and Tokka.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: When a magic sceptre accidentally transports April back through time to 16th-century Japan, the boys take off in hot pursuit, cowabungling their way right out of the sewers.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: A group of girls are kidnapped and trained to become assassins for a criminal organisation, ruled over by the ruthless Madam M.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: A group of girls are kidnapped and trained to become assassins for a criminal organisation, ruled over by the ruthless Madam M.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: Terrifier
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Tara Heyes finds herself as the obsession of a sadistic murderer known as Art the Clown.

programme.title: Terrifier 2
programme.desc: Resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County to terrorise a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween night.

programme.title: Winnie the Pooh: Blood and Honey
programme.desc: After Christopher Robin abandons them for college, Pooh and Piglet embark on a bloody rampage as they search for a new source of food.

programme.title: Winnie The Pooh: Blood And Honey 2
programme.desc: Not wanting to live in the shadows any longer, Winnie-the-Pooh, Piglet, Owl and Tigger take their fight to the town of Ashdown, leaving a bloody trail of death and mayhem in their wake.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: Christian, a millionaire heir, meets Sigrid, a young student, on a dating app. They hit it off, but there's only one problem: Christian lives with Frank, a man who dresses up and constantly acts like a dog.

programme.title: Dollman vs. Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: Possession
programme.desc: A woman starts exhibiting increasingly disturbing behavior after asking her husband for a divorce. Suspicions of infidelity soon give way to something much more sinister.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna follows in her mother's footsteps and travels through the stones back in time to 18th-century Scotland, where she struggles to make her way to the Colonies to find her parents.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Roger's diligent search for Brianna pays off when he finds her in Wilmington, but their romantic reunion comes to an abrupt halt when she discovers pertinent information that he intentionally kept from her.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Brianna struggles to compartmentalise the trauma she's suffered in the wake of the tragedy that befell her in Wilmington, she refocuses on finding her parents.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie try to make a home for themselves in the rough and dangerous 'New World' of America.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie visit his Aunt Jocasta at her plantation, River Run. When tragedy strikes at the plantation, Jamie and Claire find themselves caught between what's right and the law of the land.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire search for a place to call home. Meanwhile, in the 20th-century, Brianna and Roger's romance heats up and then fizzles during a road trip that winds up highlighting their differences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Having been led by providence to Fraser's Ridge, Jamie, Claire and Young Ian begin to build a home in the Blue Ridge Mountains. In the 20th century, Roger tries to reconnect with Brianna.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire's medical expertise proves invaluable, but she begins to fear for her life when tragedy strikes her patients' household. Jamie and Young Ian travel to a nearby town to recruit settlers for Fraser's Ridge.

programme.title: Men in Kilts
programme.desc: A road trip with Sam and Graham. Watch as the pair set out to discover how they and their Outlander characters fit into a system forged through war and peace.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire are surprised when Lord John Grey drops in on Fraser's Ridge with an unexpected companion; when Grey takes ill, Claire must reconcile her personal feelings with her duties as a doctor.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna follows in her mother's footsteps and travels through the stones back in time to 18th-century Scotland, where she struggles to make her way to the Colonies to find her parents.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Brianna struggles to compartmentalise the trauma she's suffered in the wake of the tragedy that befell her in Wilmington, she refocuses on finding her parents.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire keep secrets from one another as they try to help Brianna process her recent trauma. But the secrets they keep cause a bigger familial rift once they are revealed.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie, Claire and Young Ian embark on a long, uncertain journey to rescue Roger, while Brianna forges a friendship with one of Jamie's old friends as she fends off Aunt Jocasta's attempts to find a husband.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna confronts a violent figure from her past in an attempt to cope with her trauma. Roger befriends a fellow captive and endeavours to escape the Mohawk village.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie, Claire and Young Ian's attempt to rescue Roger from his Mohawk captors goes awry when a ghost from Claire's past lays waste to their plan. Brianna worries Claire, Jamie and Roger might not return.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Following celebrations in honour of Brianna and Roger's wedding, Governor Tryon reminds Jamie of his obligation to hunt down and kill Murtagh Fitzgibbons.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie continues to hunt Murtagh with the aid of the zealous Lieutenant Hamilton Knox, he's forced to consider whether or not he's on the right side of history.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The growing Regulator threat forces Jamie, Claire and Roger to embark on a mission to raise a militia.

programme.desc: The Regulator Rebellion reaches a boiling point, forcing Jamie to face his fear and confront the consequence of his divided loyalties.

programme.desc: The Frasers must come to terms with all that has changed in the aftermath of the Battle of Alamance Creek. Brianna tries to help Roger overcome the trauma he has endured.

programme.desc: When Jamie is bitten by a venomous snake, Claire fears she may not have the resources to save him. Jamie asks Roger to complete an important task in the event of his death.

programme.desc: Jamie and Roger implement their plan to eliminate the threat looming over them, but it goes awry. Brianna is forced to confront her greatest fear and fight for her and her son's lives.

programme.desc: A revelation about Jemmy forces Roger and Brianna to choose between staying in the 18th century, or returning to the safety of the future.
